content.full_text:
California Fair Political Practices Commission

October 9, 1990

Mary Herr  
City Clerk  
City of Mill Valley  
P.O. Box 1029  
Mill Valley, CA 94942

Re: Your Request for Informal Assistance  
Our File No. G-90-405

Dear Ms. Herr:

This is in response to your June 7, 1990 letter requesting assistance in locating a specific document. Specifically, you have asked if the Fair Political Practices Commission (the "Commission") has a reference document titled "Model Fair Campaign Practices Agreement", and if so, whether it would be possible to receive a copy.

Upon researching our historical files, we have determined that in 1983 the Commission did produce and distribute to the public a document titled the "Model Fair Campaign Practices Agreement". However, the Commission no longer performs those functions.

Currently, the information relating to fair campaign practices is contained in the California Elections Code, Division 9, Chapter 6, Article 3, Section 12500, (copy enclosed). More specifically, the "Code for Fair Campaign Practices," formerly titled "Model Fair Campaign Practices Agreement," can be located at Elections Code Section 12520. Enclosed, please find a copy of the "Code of Fair Campaign Practices" as it appears in the Elections Code.

If I can be of any further assistance in your research, please feel free to call me at (916) 322-5901. If you should have

Further questions regarding the Elections Code, please contact the Secretary of State's Office, Elections Division, at (916) 445-0820.

Sincerely,

Scott Hallabrin
Acting General Counsel

By: Cheryl A. Hoff
Staff Services Analyst
Legal Division

SH:CAH:G90405

Enclosure
